calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-16-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha.
Nathan Austin, Esq. for Plaintiff All Hallows Associates, L.P., present with Willie Fisher the property manager.
Joyce Jordan, Esq. for Defendant Merolyn Wilson, also present.
Parties have reached a settlement agreement, not read into the record.
Pending signatures by the parties, TRIAL DATE is protected.
Settlement Conference is taken off-calendar.

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Defts
Off Calendar Dec-16-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Marolyn Wilson, Defendant Propria Persona and Moving Party
Linda N. Reyes, Esq., Kimball, Tirey & St.John (925) 469-1690 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party All Hallows Associates LP
RULING:
The Court's tentative ruling required that each Defendant and Greg Lynas appear personally; Defendant Larry Benjamin is not present. Greg Lynas and Marolyn Wilson are sworn and examined. DEFENDANT MEROLYN WILSON and LARRY BENJAMIN'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Defendants is DENIED; Defendants have 5 days leave to answer. Order signed. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
